title: ardisia palawanensis
intro: Ardisia palawanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, commonly known as the Palawan ardisia or Palawan coral berry. It is native to the Philippines, specifically found in the island of Palawan. The medicinal properties of Ardisia palawanensis include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to lower fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, which can be obtained through herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions.
